name: Ferryman
description: Controls the only crossing for miles. Patient as the river. Charges what the market will bear and doesn't hurry for anyone.
dialogue_hooks: quoting the crossing price and not negotiating
warning about the current being strong today
mentioning something unusual that floated past
asking if you're the ones the other group was asking about
voice_patterns: man of few words — speaks in short declaratives
old river sage — the river teaches patience
grumpy toll-taker — doesn't want conversation, wants coin
superstitious waterman — respects the river and expects you to

schedule.morning: first crossings at dawn, checking boat
schedule.night: home on shore, listening to the river
